_readme: FPL Assistant qualitative signal sources. Set enabled=true to activate a source. Sources that fail (network error, wrong URL) are skipped gracefully.

sources.name: BBC Sport Football
sources.description: Live injury updates, team news, and transfer headlines from BBC Sport

sources.name: The Guardian Football
sources.description: Football analysis, previews, and injury news from The Guardian

sources.name: LetsTalkFPL (YouTube)
sources.description: GW preview and player analysis videos from LetsTalkFPL

sources.name: FPL Mate (YouTube)
sources.description: FPL tips, captain picks, and transfer advice

sources.name: FPL General (YouTube)
sources.description: GW previews and FPL community discussion from FPL General

sources.name: FMTTM (YouTube)
sources.description: From the Mouth of a Trout — detailed FPL analysis videos
sources.note: Could not auto-detect channel ID. Visit https://www.youtube.com/@FMTTM, right-click → View Page Source, search for 'externalId' and paste the UC... value above, then set enabled=true.

sources.name: FPL Pod (Official PL Podcast)
sources.description: Official Premier League FPL podcast with Kelly Somers, Julien Laurens and Sam Bonfield

sources.name: FPL Cast (Podcast)
sources.description: FPL Cast podcast — weekly analysis and community debate
sources.note: Could not find RSS URL automatically. Visit their podcast page and look for the RSS feed link, then paste it above and set enabled=true.

sources.name: Premier League Press Conferences
sources.description: Manager press conference summaries from the official PL website
sources.note: The PL website uses JavaScript rendering. Disabled by default.
